            "name": "Pomodoro",
            "nameZh": "番茄钟",
            "description": "A desktop Pomodoro timer widget rendered by Clawd Companion.",
            "descriptionZh": "显示在桌面 Clawd 旁边的专注计时器组件。",
            "events": [],

            "readme": "# Pomodoro\n\nA lightweight focus timer shown directly on your desktop next to Clawd.\n\n## How to use\n\n- Enable the plugin to show the widget.\n- Configure **Focus duration** and **Break duration** in this plugin page.\n- Use the widget buttons to start, pause, or reset the current round.\n- If **Show drag handle** is enabled, use the dotted handle above the timer to drag it quickly.\n- You can also turn on edit-position mode in Appearance for precise placement.\n\n## Safety\n\nThis is a widget-only plugin. It does not listen to Claude Code events and does not require script permissions.",
            "readmeZh": "# 番茄钟\n\n一个显示在桌面 Clawd 旁边的轻量专注计时器。\n\n## 如何使用\n\n- 启用插件即可显示番茄钟组件。\n- 在本插件详情页配置 **专注时长** 和 **休息时长**。\n- 在桌面组件上点击开始、暂停或重置当前轮次。\n- 如果开启 **显示拖动点**，番茄钟顶部会出现点阵小把手，可以直接拖动调整位置。\n- 也可以到「外观」中打开位置编辑模式，更精确地调整番茄钟位置。\n\n## 安全说明\n\n这是一个纯组件插件。它不监听 Claude Code 事件，也不需要脚本权限。"
          },
          "version": "1.0.0",
          "author": "Clawd",
          "readme": "# Pomodoro\n\nA lightweight focus timer shown directly on your desktop next to Clawd.\n\n## How to use\n\n- Enable the plugin to show the widget.\n- Configure **Focus duration** and **Break duration** in this plugin page.\n- Use the widget buttons to start, pause, or reset the current round.\n- Turn on edit-position mode in Appearance to drag the widget to your preferred location.\n\n## Safety\n\nThis is a widget-only plugin. It does not listen to Claude Code events and does not require script permissions.",
          "readmeZh": "# 番茄钟\n\n一个显示在桌面 Clawd 旁边的轻量专注计时器。\n\n## 如何使用\n\n- 启用插件即可显示番茄钟组件。\n- 在本插件详情页配置 **专注时长** 和 **休息时长**。\n- 在桌面组件上点击开始、暂停或重置当前轮次。\n- 到「外观」中打开位置编辑模式，可以拖动番茄钟到你喜欢的位置。\n\n## 安全说明\n\n这是一个纯组件插件。它不监听 Claude Code 事件，也不需要脚本权限。",

          "enabled": true,

            "maxTimeline": 50

          "manifest": {
            "name": "Daily Report",
            "nameZh": "每日编码报告",
            "description": "Generate a beautiful HTML daily report of your Claude Code sessions.",
            "descriptionZh": "为你的 Claude Code 会话生成精美的 HTML 每日编码报告。",
            "events": [
              "done"
            ],
            "permissions": [
              "filesystem"
            ],
            "timeoutMs": 60000,
            "settings": [
              {
                "key": "reportHour",
                "label": "Report time (hour)",
                "labelZh": "每日此时自动生成昨日报告（0-23 时）",
                "type": "number",
                "default": 22,
                "min": 0,
                "max": 23,
                "step": 1,
                "description": "Hour of day to auto-generate (0-23). Use 'Run now' for manual trigger."
              },
              {
                "key": "maxTimeline",
                "label": "Max timeline items",
                "labelZh": "报告中最多显示多少条事件记录",
                "type": "number",
                "default": 20,
                "min": 5,
                "max": 50,
                "step": 5,
                "description": "Maximum number of events shown in the timeline"
              },
              {
                "key": "generateCumulative",
                "label": "Generate cumulative report",
                "labelZh": "生成累计报告",
                "type": "toggle",
                "default": true,
                "description": "Also maintain a cumulative all-time report (clawd-report-cumulative.html) with per-date breakdown and date switching."
              }
            ],
            "readme": "# Daily Report\n\nGenerate a beautiful HTML daily report of your Claude Code sessions.\n\n## How to use\n\n1. Install, trust, and enable the plugin.\n2. Set the **Report time** hour (0-23). The plugin auto-generates at that hour.\n3. You can also click **Generate now** in the detail page to generate immediately.\n4. Enable **Generate cumulative report** to maintain an all-time stats page with date switching.\n5. Reports are saved to `~/.clawd-companion/plugin-data/daily-report/`.\n\n## What's in the report\n\n- Session overview: total sessions, duration, tool calls, errors, success rate\n- Tool usage distribution (bar chart)\n- Event timeline (color-coded)\n- Success/error ratio (donut chart)\n- Peak activity hour, average session duration, top tools\n\n## Cumulative report\n\nWhen enabled, `clawd-report-cumulative.html` contains:\n- All-time aggregate stats across every recorded day\n- Per-date breakdown with expandable daily cards\n- Interactive date switching to view any day in detail\n- Search/filter by date range\n\n## Report naming\n\nFiles are named `clawd-report-YYYY-MM-DD.html` — one per day, no duplicates.",
            "readmeZh": "# 每日编码报告\n\n为你的 Claude Code 会话生成精美的 HTML 每日编码报告。\n\n## 如何使用\n\n1. 安装、信任并启用插件。\n2. 设置 **报告时间** 小时（0-23）。插件会在该时间自动生成。\n3. 也可以在详情页点击 **立即生成** 手动生成。\n4. 开启 **生成累计报告** 可维护一份包含全部历史的统计页面，支持日期切换。\n5. 报告保存在 `~/.clawd-companion/plugin-data/daily-report/`。\n\n## 报告内容\n\n- 会话概览：总会话数、总时长、工具调用次数、错误次数、成功率\n- 工具使用分布（条形图）\n- 事件时间线（彩色标记）\n- 成功/错误比例（环形图）\n- 活跃高峰时段、平均会话时长、最常用工具\n\n## 累计报告\n\n开启后，`clawd-report-cumulative.html` 包含：\n- 所有记录天数的聚合统计数据\n- 按日期分组的可展开每日卡片\n- 交互式日期切换查看任意一天详情\n- 按日期范围搜索/筛选\n\n## 文件命名\n\n文件名为 `clawd-report-YYYY-MM-DD.html` — 每天一份，不会重复堆积。"
          },
          "version": "1.0.0",
          "author": "Clawd",
          "readme": "# Daily Report\n\nGenerate a beautiful HTML daily report of your Claude Code sessions.\n\n## How to use\n\n1. Install, trust, and enable the plugin.\n2. Configure the **Report time** — the plugin checks on each task completion whether it's time to generate.\n3. Configure the **Output directory** — where to save the HTML report files.\n4. After the configured time, complete a task and the report will be generated automatically.\n\n## What's in the report\n\n- Session overview: total sessions, duration, tool calls, errors\n- Tool usage distribution (bar chart)\n- Event timeline (color-coded)\n- Success/error ratio (donut chart)\n- Token usage breakdown\n\n## Privacy\n\nThe report is generated locally and never sent anywhere. It contains only event metadata, not code content.",
          "readmeZh": "# 每日编码报告\n\n为你的 Claude Code 会话生成精美的 HTML 每日编码报告。\n\n## 如何使用\n\n1. 安装、信任并启用插件。\n2. 配置 **报告时间** — 插件会在每次任务完成时检查是否到了生成报告的时间。\n3. 配置 **输出目录** — HTML 报告文件的保存位置。\n4. 到达配置的时间后，完成一个任务即可自动生成报告。\n\n## 报告内容\n\n- 会话概览：总会话数、总时长、工具调用次数、错误次数\n- 工具使用分布（条形图）\n- 事件时间线（彩色标记）\n- 成功/错误比例（环形图）\n- Token 用量明细\n\n## 隐私\n\n报告完全在本地生成，不会发送到任何地方。只包含事件元数据，不包含代码内容。",
          "resolvedAssets": {},
          "resolvedDataDir": "C:\\Users\\Doulor\\AppData\\Roaming\\clawd-companion\\clawd-companion\\plugin-data\\market-daily-report"
        },
        {
          "id": "market-diagnostic-logger",
          "marketId": "diagnostic-logger",
          "name": "Diagnostic Logger",
          "scriptPath": "C:\\Users\\Doulor\\AppData\\Roaming\\clawd-companion\\clawd-companion\\plugins\\diagnostic-logger\\index.cjs",
          "enabled": true,

            "done",
            "session_start",

          ],

          ],
          "manifest": {
            "name": "Diagnostic Logger",
            "nameZh": "诊断日志",
            "description": "Generate a detailed local diagnostic report for Clawd Companion support cases.",
            "descriptionZh": "为 Clawd Companion 支持与排障场景生成详细本地诊断报告。",
            "events": [
              "error",
              "done",
              "session_start",
              "permission_wait"
            ],
            "permissions": [
              "filesystem",
              "shell"
            ],
            "timeoutMs": 20000,
            "settings": [
              {
                "key": "includeFullRuntimeLog",
                "label": "Include full runtime log",
                "labelZh": "包含完整 runtime.log",
                "type": "toggle",
                "default": true,
                "description": "Include the full runtime.log instead of only the tail. Useful for hard-to-reproduce problems."
              },
              {
                "key": "includeEventHistoryTail",
                "label": "Include event history tail",
                "labelZh": "包含最近事件历史",
                "type": "toggle",
                "default": true,
                "description": "Include recent event metadata from event-history.json."
              },
              {
                "key": "eventHistoryLimit",
                "label": "Event history entries",

                "type": "number",
                "default": 120,
                "min": 20,
                "max": 500,
                "step": 20,
                "description": "Maximum recent event entries included in the report."
              },
              {
                "key": "includeSettings",
                "label": "Include settings snapshot",
                "labelZh": "包含设置快照",
                "type": "toggle",
                "default": true,
                "description": "Include Clawd settings with local token-like fields redacted."
              },
              {
                "key": "includeDirectoryTree",
                "label": "Include install/data file listing",
                "labelZh": "包含安装/数据文件列表",
                "type": "toggle",
                "default": true,
                "description": "List relevant files in app data, plugin data, and install resource folders when visible."
              }
            ],
            "readme": "# Diagnostic Logger\n\nGenerate detailed local logs, then analyze the newest generated log with built-in diagnosis rules.\n\n## How to use\n\n1. Install this plugin from the market.\n2. Open the plugin detail page.\n3. Turn on **Trusted for scripts** and **Enabled**.\n4. Click **Generate logs** to write a fresh `clawd-log-*.md/json` snapshot.\n5. Click **Run diagnosis** to read the newest log snapshot and write a `clawd-diagnosis-*.md/json` summary.\n\n## What diagnosis checks\n\n- Runtime log warnings, load failures, missing assets, renderer errors, and plugin execution problems\n- Pet visibility settings such as opacity, scale, enabled state, click-through, and position offsets\n- Invalid idle/action animation sprite mappings and sprite override plugins\n- Hook/source connection problems, permission UI flow problems, update problems, and JSON/settings parse errors\n- Recent event-history, stats health, OS, process, memory, environment hints, and relevant file listings\n\n## Privacy\n\nReports are written locally only. The plugin redacts token-like values and does not upload anything. Because this plugin is meant for local diagnosis, it intentionally collects verbose diagnostic metadata.",
            "readmeZh": "# 诊断日志\n\n先生成详细本地日志，再用内置诊断规则分析最新日志。\n\n## 使用方式\n\n1. 从插件市场安装本插件。\n2. 打开插件详情页。\n3. 打开 **信任脚本执行** 和 **启用**。\n4. 点击 **生成日志**，写入最新的 `clawd-log-*.md/json` 快照。\n5. 点击 **一键诊断**，读取最新日志快照并生成 `clawd-diagnosis-*.md/json` 总结。\n\n## 诊断会检查什么\n\n- 运行日志里的 warning、加载失败、资源缺失、渲染错误和插件执行异常\n- 桌宠可见性设置，例如透明度、缩放、启用状态、点击穿透、位置偏移\n- 无效的待机/动作动画 sprite 映射，以及启用中的 sprite 覆盖插件\n- Hook/数据源连接问题、权限卡片流程问题、更新问题、JSON/设置解析错误\n- 最近事件历史、统计数据、OS、进程、内存、环境变量线索和相关文件列表\n\n## 隐私\n\n报告只写入本地，不会上传任何内容。插件会遮蔽 token 类字段。因为它面向本地诊断，所以会刻意收集比较详细的诊断元数据。"
          },
          "version": "1.0.0",
          "author": "Clawd",
          "readme": "# Diagnostic Logger\n\nGenerate detailed local logs, then analyze the newest generated log with built-in diagnosis rules.\n\n## How to use\n\n1. Install this plugin from the market.\n2. Open the plugin detail page.\n3. Turn on **Trusted for scripts** and **Enabled**.\n4. Click **Generate logs** to write a fresh `clawd-log-*.md/json` snapshot.\n5. Click **Run diagnosis** to read the newest log snapshot and write a `clawd-diagnosis-*.md/json` summary.\n\n## What diagnosis checks\n\n- Runtime log warnings, load failures, missing assets, renderer errors, and plugin execution problems\n- Pet visibility settings such as opacity, scale, enabled state, click-through, and position offsets\n- Invalid idle/action animation sprite mappings and sprite override plugins\n- Hook/source connection problems, permission UI flow problems, update problems, and JSON/settings parse errors\n- Recent event-history, stats health, OS, process, memory, environment hints, and relevant file listings\n\n## Privacy\n\nReports are written locally only. The plugin redacts token-like values and does not upload anything. Because this plugin is meant for local diagnosis, it intentionally collects verbose diagnostic metadata.",
          "readmeZh": "# 诊断日志\n\n先生成详细本地日志，再用内置诊断规则分析最新日志。\n\n## 使用方式\n\n1. 从插件市场安装本插件。\n2. 打开插件详情页。\n3. 打开 **信任脚本执行** 和 **启用**。\n4. 点击 **生成日志**，写入最新的 `clawd-log-*.md/json` 快照。\n5. 点击 **一键诊断**，读取最新日志快照并生成 `clawd-diagnosis-*.md/json` 总结。\n\n## 诊断会检查什么\n\n- 运行日志里的 warning、加载失败、资源缺失、渲染错误和插件执行异常\n- 桌宠可见性设置，例如透明度、缩放、启用状态、点击穿透、位置偏移\n- 无效的待机/动作动画 sprite 映射，以及启用中的 sprite 覆盖插件\n- Hook/数据源连接问题、权限卡片流程问题、更新问题、JSON/设置解析错误\n- 最近事件历史、统计数据、OS、进程、内存、环境变量线索和相关文件列表\n\n## 隐私\n\n报告只写入本地，不会上传任何内容。插件会遮蔽 token 类字段。因为它面向本地诊断，所以会刻意收集比较详细的诊断元数据。",
          "resolvedAssets": {},
          "resolvedDataDir": "C:\\Users\\Doulor\\AppData\\Roaming\\clawd-companion\\clawd-companion\\plugin-data\\market-diagnostic-logger"
